description: Nicely located at the back of the complex, this quiet end-unit offers 3 levels of thoughtfully designed and updated living, with room to grow. Windows on three sides bring natural light to the open dining and living areas, anchored by a cozy gas fireplace. A pass-through with breakfast bar connects the kitchen and opens to a balcony ideal for your BBQ. Adjacent bonus space works well as an office, TV room or playroom. 2 bright bedrooms upstairs have vaulted ceilings, each with ensuite bath. The lower level adapts easily as a rec room or 3rd bedroom, with full bath, laundry, storage, walk-out patio & direct access to two secure parking spaces. Minutes to amenities, trails, and recreation—it’s easy to see why Craftsman Estates is one of Lynn Valley’s most sought-after townhome communities.
